items.title: Compare modal resets when switching location
items.precondition: Logged in as admin; viewing a multi-location practice on /pmsStatistics where two locations have referral keyData with different months/values.
steps: 2. Click 'Compare' to open the Compare months modal.
3. Change the month pickers (and/or click 'Explain this comparison' to generate the AI paragraph).
5. Switch the active location to Location B (different data).
6. Click 'Compare' again to reopen the modal.
items.expected: On reopen, the month pickers default to Location B's most recent months (not Location A's picks), and the AI comparison paragraph is cleared (shows the 'Explain this comparison' prompt again). No Location A data is shown.
items.evidence: Live via preview (One Endodontics, org 39). Falls Church: opened Compare (defaults Mar 2026 vs Apr 2026), clicked 'Explain this comparison' -> AI insight generated: 'April saw a decline across the board: 321 referrals dropped to 279 (down 42), and production fell from $412,783 to $373,783 (down $39,430)...'. Switched location to Fredericksburg and reopened Compare -> AI insight CLEARED (modal shows the 'Explain this comparison' prompt again, no 'AI comparison' section), and the metric grid now shows Fredericksburg's own data (Production $193.8K -> $232.2K up 20%, Total referrals 144 -> 158 up 10%) with zero Falls Church carry-over. Confirms key={locationId} remounts the modal on location switch.

items.title: Within one location, selections persist across close/reopen
items.precondition: Logged in as admin; viewing a single location on /pmsStatistics with at least two months of referral data.
steps: 2. Change the month pickers to a non-default pair.
4. Reopen the modal (same location, no location switch).
items.expected: The previously picked month pair is still selected — no unintended reset when the location did not change.
items.evidence: Verified by construction: the new key is key={locationId ?? 'none'}, which changes ONLY when locationId changes. Same-location open/close leaves the key unchanged, so React keeps the same CompareMonthsModal instance mounted and its useState month picks + useMutation insight persist (no remount, no reset). A live close/reopen could not be isolated in the backgrounded preview tab because the framer-motion AnimatePresence exit animation is throttled when the tab is not focused; the T1 live run confirms the reset triggers on location change specifically, not on open/close.
